title: Fusion Project Milestones Timeline
executive_question: What are the key milestones and delays for major fusion projects (ITER, SPARC, Helion) and when is first plasma or commercial operation expected?
search_queries: ITER project timeline 2025 first plasma date
Commonwealth Fusion Systems SPARC construction timeline 2024
data_quality_rule: Use only official project updates or verified news; note if dates are estimates; flag any missing milestones.

title: Levelized Cost of Electricity (LCOE) Projections for Fusion vs. Other Sources
executive_question: How do projected LCOE estimates for fusion compare with solar, wind, nuclear fission, and natural gas from 2024 to 2050?
preferred_sources: Lazard Levelized Cost of Energy Analysis
search_queries: Lazard LCOE 2024 solar wind nuclear gas
IEA World Energy Outlook 2024 LCOE assumptions
data_quality_rule: Collect multiple estimates for fusion to show range; clearly label source and year for each data point; exclude speculative values without basis.

title: Public vs. Private Fusion Investment (2015-2024)
executive_question: How has annual investment in fusion energy changed over time, and what is the split between public and private sources?
preferred_sources: DOE Office of Science fusion budget
search_queries: fusion energy private investment 2024 venture capital
data_quality_rule: Use consistent currency (USD) and inflation-adjust if possible; note that private investment data may be incomplete; cite sources for each data point.

title: Regulatory Frameworks for Fusion Licensing by Country
executive_question: Which countries have established or are developing licensing frameworks for fusion energy, and what is the stage of development?
preferred_sources: US Nuclear Regulatory Commission fusion rulemaking
search_queries: US NRC fusion licensing framework 2024 status
UK fusion regulatory framework 2024 Environment Agency
IAEA fusion regulatory status by country 2024
data_quality_rule: Verify framework status with official regulatory documents; note if information is outdated; include date of last update.

title: Fusion Energy Market Size Forecast (2025-2050)
executive_question: What is the projected market size (in GW installed capacity or $B revenue) for fusion energy over time, and what are the key assumptions?
search_queries: IEA fusion capacity in net zero scenario 2050
data_quality_rule: Clearly state source and scenario assumptions; use ranges to reflect uncertainty; avoid single-point estimates without context.
